cpu: AMD A8-7600 Radeon R7, 10 Compute Cores 4C+6G
notes:
La única manera que inicie es usando PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%  , pero luego queda en pantalla negra. Otra cosa que crashea sin usar nada. 
Muestra un mensaje de error que me pasa frecuentemente : 

Failed to initialize graphics. Make sure you have DirectX 11 installed, have up to date drivers for your graphics card and have not disabled 3D acceleration in display settings. InitializeEngineGraphics failed

He probado por si fuera mi tarjeta gráfica en Windows 10 pero el juego funciona muy bien.
title: Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms

notes: At first, it claimed DirectX 11 support. After installing the graphics packages such as mesa and vulkan, it runs perfectly.
title: Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms

notes: Works well with Wine D3D11 enabled
title: Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms

notes: Game crashes with a Graphics DirectX 11 error as soon as I click on "PLAY".
title: Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms

notes: The game was crashing with an error as soon as I clicked on "PLAY", but worked perfectly after I set the following launch options: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%". Now everything seems to be working.
title: Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms
Idle Champions of the Forgotten Realms

notes: It had some graphical issues, but everything works perfectly when you use Wine D3d11 with the following launch options: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%".

notes: It runs perfect out of the box, both fullscreen and in window. It constantly runs at 60fps, while in windows 7 it runs at 20 fps at the same settings.
